description: Style Note Trust outdoors experts wildcraft to provide great simple designs which will keep you warm. This jacket can be thrown on over your casuals when you are in an outdoorsy mood so you can stay cosy and warm throughout. Product Details Black jacket, has a front zip closure, long sleeves, two insert pockets above the hem in front, a hood and stitched detailing Material and Care 100% polyester Machine wash cold Do not tumble dry, iron or dry clean Dry in shade Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size SPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
